2604.23577.title: RouteNLP: Closed-Loop LLM Routing with Conformal Cascading and Distillation Co-Optimization
2604.23577.paper_summary: Serving diverse NLP workloads with large language models is costly: at one enterprise partner, inference costs exceeded $200K/month despite over 70% of queries being routine tasks well within the capability of smaller models. We present RouteNLP, a closed-loop framework that routes queries across a tiered model portfolio to minimize cost while satisfying per-task quality constraints. The framework integrates three components: a difficulty-aware router with shared task-conditioned representations trained on preference data and quality signals; confidence-calibrated cascading that uses conformal prediction for distribution-free threshold initialization; and a distillation-routing co-optimization loop that clusters escalation failures, applies targeted knowledge distillation to cheaper models, and automatically retrains the router, yielding over twice the cost improvement of untargeted distillation. In an 8-week pilot deployment processing ~5K queries/day at an enterprise customer-service division, RouteNLP reduced inference costs by 58% while maintaining 91% response acceptance and reducing p99 latency from 1,847 ms to 387 ms. On a six-task benchmark spanning finance, customer service, and legal domains, the framework achieves 40-85% cost reduction while retaining 96-100% quality on structured tasks and 96-98% on generation tasks, with human evaluation confirming that 74.5% of routed generation outputs match or exceed frontier-model quality.
2604.23577.paper_summary_zh: 提供多樣化的自然語言處理工作負載與大型語言模型的成本高昂：在一個企業合作夥伴中，推理成本超過每月 20 萬美元，儘管超過 70% 的查詢是常規任務，這些任務完全在較小模型的能力範圍內。我們提出了 RouteNLP，一個閉環框架，通過分層模型組合路由查詢，以最小化成本，同時滿足每個任務的質量約束。該框架整合了三個組件：一個基於難度的路由器，具有基於偏好數據和質量信號訓練的共享任務條件表示；使用符合預測進行無分佈閾值初始化的信心校準級聯；以及一個蒸餾路由共同優化循環，聚類升級失敗，對較便宜的模型應用有針對性的知識蒸餾，並自動重新訓練路由器，實現了超過未針對性蒸餾的兩倍成本改善。在一個為期 8 週的試點部署中，處理約 5,000 條查詢/天於一家企業客戶服務部門，RouteNLP 將推理成本降低了 58%，同時保持 91% 的回應接受率，並將 p99 延遲從 1,847 毫秒降低到 387 毫秒。在一個涵蓋金融、客戶服務和法律領域的六任務基準中，該框架實現了 40-85% 的成本降低，同時在結構化任務上保持 96-100% 的質量，在生成任務上保持 96-98% 的質量，並且人類評估確認 74.5% 的路由生成輸出達到或超過前沿模型的質量。
2604.23577.author: Dongxin Guo et.al.
2604.23577.authors: Dongxin Guo, Jikun Wu, Siu Ming Yiu
